name: Manitou Gold Inc.
summary: Manitou Gold Inc. acquires, explores for, and develops mineral property interests located in the Gold Rock District of Northwestern Ontario and in the Goudreau-Localsh area of Northern Ontario, Canada. The company explores for gold properties. Its principal mineral assets include a 100% interest in the Kenwest property that holds 32 patented mining claims and 10 mining licenses of occupation covering 599 hectares located in the Boyer Lake area; and the Goudreau property covering 22,500 hectares located in north of Wawa, Ontario. Manitou Gold Inc. is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
